creator: neon_libra@hotmail.com
text:
D-Link DFE-530TX - vr0 NICs give 'Watchdog Timeouts' and 'Reset Never Completed' errors and eventually stop accepting external packets. If I ping the card locally I get a response but it is unable to see anyother hosts. This problem is all over the newsgroups... we want a fix! =)

Fix: 

None
How-To-Repeat: Just install one of those crappy D-Link DFE-530TX cards.
